title: Bitcoin market cap rebound to take '5-10 years' after dropping 10 places since mid-2025
summary: Bitcoin could be absent from the world's top five assets by market cap until 2036, despite an estimate seeing the BTC bear market being nearly 70% complete.

title: Aztec hit by second $2.1M exploit in less than week: SlowMist
summary: Security researchers warn that deprecated smart contracts can remain vulnerable long after projects stop maintaining them.

title: Wellington’s Geary Says Stocks Rotation Trade Is Coming Back
summary: The end of the Iran war is reviving investor appetite for stocks outside the US, according to Scott Geary, the head of global wealth at Wellington Management.

title: Stocks Rise, Oil Slides After Trump Inks Iran Deal: Markets Wrap
summary: US stocks rebounded and oil prices fell as some energy shipments began to transit the Strait of Hormuz, hours after President Donald Trump signed a preliminary deal to end the war in the Middle East.

title: CME to Sue CFTC Over Bitcoin Perpetual Futures Approval: CEO
summary: Outgoing CME chief Terry Duffy says perpetual futures are actually swaps under Dodd-Frank, and that the exchange will file suit Thursday.

title: Bitcoin Steadies Near $64K as Analysts Eye Floor After Hawkish Fed
summary: BTC slid to around $64,100 after Kevin Warsh's hawkish debut, but analysts argue a $60,000 floor and catalysts could spark a rebound.

title: ‘Bitcoin Rodney’ pleads guilty in $1.8 billion crypto fraud case
